milestoneTitle: Phase M9.19a.6 — Retire pin + mastery icons from Learn tiles. Pin becomes a strictly universal 'send to Learn' action that lives only on Tools/Projects/Snippets/News cards; once an item is IN Learn, there is no pin affordance (it's already here — pinning again was a semantic contradiction). Mastery collapses into completion: the state pill (Start/Continue/Done) carries the completion signal, no separate manual-mastery toggle on Learn. Both renderLearnItemRow (Learn list) and renderDashLearn (dashboard Learn panel) now render all three bottom-row icon slots invisible (data-empty='1'); the 3×32px row stays reserved for future flags (overflow / warning / locked / recommended / has-notes) per the locked-layout-now rule. Zone placement (Up Next ↔ Everything else) still wires through drag-to-zone — wireLearnGrabHandle continues to call pinLearnItem / unpinLearnItem under the hood, just no longer via a tap-button. Draft deletion still fires via the swipe wrap (M9.19a.2). buildLearnItems still reads isLearnItemPinned + isMastered to determine zone bucketing; only the TILE buttons are gone. Known follow-up (flagged, out of scope): Projects dashboard tile's pin semantic ('has pinned tools/snippets inside') still conflicts with the universal 'pin = send to Learn' rule — cleanup when Projects dashboard migration catches up.
